info.english_meaning: to long for to wish to be greedy to desire
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' BUvAderavftkftatvAt loBate iti Bavati iti AtreyaH ' iti mA.DA. vfttiriha anusanDeyA  ' gArDyam = AkANkzA ' iti ca tatra vfttiH  ' gArDye luByati mohArTe tudAderluBatIti Se (Slo. 141) iti devaH

upasarga_meanings.meaning: luBAnA AkarzaRa karanA apane taraPa Akarzita karanA
luBAnA AkarzaRa karanA apane taraPa Akarzita karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yanme mAtA praluluBe vicarantyaprativratA' (manu॰9.20) prAtivatyaM DarmamatIyAya pumantare lubDA baBUva
'yadvayaM saMSitAtmAnaM pralobDaM tvAmihAgatAH' (BA॰Adi॰217.3) praloBayituM DarmAd viBraSyAtmani (svasmin) praRayavantaM kartumityarTaH
'smara yAvanna viloByase divi' (ku0 420) viloByase garDyase Akfzyase
'samIpavAsena viloBitAste' (BA0 vana0 1769) viloBitA vimohitA budDiviBramaM gamitAH
'daDadviluBitaM vAtEH kesaraM vahnipiNgam' (Bawwi0 94) viluBitaM paryAkulIkftam viluBitaH sImantaH AkulIkfta ityarTaH viluBitAni padAni
